scripts.generate:resource-directory: node --input-type=module -e "import { writeFileSync } from 'node:fs'; import { resolve } from 'node:path'; const workspaceDirectory = process.cwd(); const resourceDirectory = resolve(workspaceDirectory, '../../resources'); writeFileSync(resolve(workspaceDirectory, 'resource-directory.json'), JSON.stringify({ resourceDirectory }, null, 2) + '\n');"
